timeline_html:
Summary. Kristina noticed her shedding less than a month ago, shortly after completing an Ayurvedic detox. She describes that it peaked but has now steadied, with new baby hairs appearing recently.

Your hair-loss triggers.

  • Ayurvedic detox (resolved; Feb–Mar 2026)

Timeline forecast. Because detox-style fasting or cleansing can briefly disrupt nutrient intake, shedding usually appears 2–3 months later and peaks within the first month of noticing extra loss. Based on your dates, the most intense shedding likely occurred around March 2026 and should continue to ease through April–May, with early regrowth visible now. Dominant driver: the short Ayurvedic detox in Feb–Mar 2026, matching the timing of your recent onset and the quick stabilization that followed.

Where you are now. You’re in the early regrowth phase—shedding has steadied and new hairs are already coming through. This is a reassuring sign that your follicles have re‑entered growth 🌱. Keep balanced nutrition and gentle care to support steady thickening over the next few months.
